entry.title: New: BILL015(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE CLIMATE RESILIENCY FUND.

Amends ROH Chapter 6 to add a new article establishing the Climate Resiliency Fund. Specifically allows moneys from the Climate Resiliency Fund to be used to fund a grant program for cesspool conversion relating to experienced, anticipated, and potential effects of climate change.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
